In this chart, Saturn has Venus

and indicates involvement in a

house, indicating a Government job in

Sat. shows that the native will have foreign
Jupt.
Db. travels on 3 occasions, two of which
will be fruitful. The native will be
deeply interested in love for the Divine. He may have a large family of 9
children. He will live upto. a good old age of 80-83 years and perform
pilgrimages.

24 BHRIGU NANDI NADI

will have 5 or 6 brothers and sisters.
